# Schuly

> Open-source student portal for iOS, Android, and Web. Schulnetz supported out of the box; more school systems via backend plugins. Free and built in the open.

Schuly is a free, open-source mobile and web app that gives students a modern interface on top of their school's existing student information system. The Flutter app handles UI, authentication, and local caching; a C# / ASP.NET Core backend (hosted on IONOS Germany) handles sync. Different school systems are integrated by writing backend plugins against the Schuly plugin SDK - the app itself just connects.

Schuly is an independent project. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Centerboard AG or any school, company, or institution.

## Core links

- [Website](https://schuly.dev/): Marketing site
- [Privacy policy](https://schuly.dev/privacy): Data protection under Swiss revDSG and GDPR
- [Imprint](https://schuly.dev/impressum): Operator information
- [Terms of use](https://schuly.dev/terms): Use at your own risk

## Source code

- [Schuly](https://github.com/schulydev/Schuly): Flutter app for iOS, Android, Web
- [SchulyBackend](https://github.com/schulydev/SchulyBackend): C# / ASP.NET Core backend
- [SchulyPlugins](https://github.com/schulydev/SchulyPlugins): Official plugins (Schulware for Schulnetz, Example)
- [SchulyPluginAbstractions](https://github.com/schulydev/SchulyPluginAbstractions): Stable plugin SDK contract (NuGet)

## Features

- Grades and analytics: trends, averages, semester reports
- Agenda and absences: schedule, exams, absence records
- Push notifications: new grades, schedule changes
- Multi-account: switch between school identities
- Cross-platform: one Flutter codebase, three first-class targets

## Technical

- Frontend: Flutter (mobile + web)
- Backend: ASP.NET Core, PostgreSQL, S3-compatible object storage
- Auth: OIDC via the school's identity provider; no passwords stored
- Marketing site: Angular 20, prerendered static HTML on Cloudflare Pages
- License: see each repository's LICENSE file
